steps.title: Use the reproduction clue
steps.content: The passage says elements of Spanish mission style have been reproduced throughout California and gives Stanford University as an example. The blank needs a word meaning to copy or mimic that style.

steps.title: Choose the matching verb
steps.content: "Imitate" means copy, which matches the idea of reproducing the mission style. A means restore or update, C means fail to care for, and D means refuse or dismiss. The answer is B.
